title: Rudgea vallis
intro: Rudgea vallis, also known as "Rudgea vallis" or "Cinchona vallis", is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, with health benefits including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antimalarial activities, which may aid in the treatment of various diseases and infections. The bioactive constituents of Rudgea vallis include alkaloids, flavonoids, and phenolic compounds, such as vallisine, which are responsible for its medicinal effects. Rudgea vallis is commonly prepared as a tea or infusion, and is sometimes used in traditional medicine to treat fever, rheumatism, and other ailments.
taxonomy: Rudgea vallis is classified within the family Rubiaceae. This family includes a large number of flowering plants commonly known as coffee or madder family.
